bead.title: Stage 3.4: install Houdini + configure codegen from schema
bead.description: `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun add -d houdini @houdinigraphql/houdini @houdinigraphql/plugin-svelte`. Create houdini.config.js pointing at ../graphql/schema.graphql. Create src/client.ts exporting a HoudiniClient. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #30.
bead.acceptance: (1) `bun run houdini:generate` runs against ../graphql/schema.graphql and produces typed files in $houdini/. (2) MANUAL: write a dummy `query { __typename }` in a src/test.gql file, regenerate, open one of the generated TypeScript files and confirm it has the expected shape. (3) houdini.config.js points at the correct schema path.
